name: finance-skills
description: 2 finance skills plus a router: financial analyst (ratio analysis, DCF valuation, budgeting, forecasting) and SaaS metrics coach (ARR, MRR, churn, CAC, LTV, NRR, Quick Ratio, 12-month projections). 7 Python automation tools. The business-investment-advisor skill ships as a separate nested plugin. Agent skill and plugin for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, OpenClaw.
